title: Podcast Pipeline mediator packet / architecture baseline context
summary: Preserves the Podcast Pipeline planning context that caused RoundTable to become necessary. It captures Phase 0/Phase 1 decisions and the Phase 2 scaffold direction.
verification: Text artifact; not a buildable app artifact.

title: RoundTable v0.10.5 baseline
summary: Baseline RoundTable app before Markdown Handoff Mode. This is the pre-v0.11.0 state used as the implementation starting point.
verification: Baseline source artifact; later checkpoints were built from this lineage.

title: v0.11.0 Markdown Handoff feasibility / phase plan
summary: Controls the v0.11.0 feature release. Reframes RoundTable as the authoritative local state manager and Markdown files as durable handoff artifacts.
verification: Planning document; used as controlling implementation plan throughout checkpoints A-I.

title: Checkpoint A — v0.11.0 foundation layer
summary: Foundation implementation for Markdown Handoff Mode. Adds types, config, hashing/normalization/parsing utilities, migration/validation, artifact import foundations, and storage pressure utilities.
verification: Build/typecheck verified clean during this chat; used as base for Checkpoint B.

title: Checkpoint B — UI shell integration
summary: Adds UI panels and tab routing for Raw Notes, Import History, and Import Preview without wiring import/export behavior yet.
verification: Independently verified in chat: npm install, tsc, production build clean.

title: Checkpoint C — Download .md export controls
summary: Adds one-way Markdown artifact export controls across prompt/response/mediator surfaces.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint C.5 — provenance capture + storage pressure surfacing
summary: Closes export-provenance and storage-warning gaps before upload/import work begins.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint D — Upload .md preview + Raw Notes fallback
summary: Adds safe inbound Markdown handling without structured state mutation. Uploaded Markdown can be previewed and preserved as Raw Notes.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint E — mediator_synthesis structured import
summary: First structured import commit path. Valid mediator_synthesis Markdown can populate structured mediator synthesis fields and rollback safely.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint F — import correctness hardening
summary: Fixes two importer correctness false positives before expanding structured import types.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint G — model_response structured import + per-slot upload
summary: Adds structured import for model_response artifacts and per-slot Upload .md controls in Responses.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint H — remaining structured imports + truncation warning fix
summary: Completes the remaining core structured import source kinds and fixes the POTENTIALLY_TRUNCATED false positive.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean.

title: Checkpoint I — v0.11.0 RC hardening + docs + acceptance walk
summary: Converts v0.11.0 from feature-complete to release-candidate ready with docs, checklist, acceptance walk, and a small Raw Notes delete UI.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean; acceptance walk 15 pass, 0 partial, 0 fail; no app-owned network surfaces.

title: PWA readiness assessment document
summary: Adds docs/PWA_READINESS.md as a planning-only assessment for the v0.12 PWA track.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean; document exists and is planning-only.

title: Checkpoint J — modal system replacement
summary: First v0.12 prep checkpoint. Replaces browser-native confirm/alert/prompt with RoundTable-styled modal APIs.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean; acceptance walk 15/15; no runtime native dialog calls remain.

title: Checkpoint K — PWA implementation bundle
summary: Adds installable/offline-capable PWA shell for static HTTPS hosting, with Netlify as first deployment target.
verification: Independently verified in chat: typecheck/build clean; acceptance walk 15/15; dist emits manifest, sw.js, workbox runtime, icons; no app-owned network calls.
